sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30193" key="e)gkata/skhyis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκατά-σκηψις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n30193.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sudden attack</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:4:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
